# Junior

> Slack bot runtime for Hono and Nitro apps.

Junior runs as a Hono app, receives Slack events, processes turns through queue-backed runtime work, and posts finalized replies back to Slack threads. Plugins add provider capabilities, credentials, MCP surfaces, runtime dependencies, and bundled skills.

- Docs: https://junior.sentry.dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/getsentry/junior
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sentry/junior

## Start Here

- Overview: https://junior.sentry.dev/start-here/overview/
- Quickstart: https://junior.sentry.dev/start-here/quickstart/
- Slack App Setup: https://junior.sentry.dev/start-here/slack-app-setup/
- Deploy to Vercel: https://junior.sentry.dev/start-here/deploy-to-vercel/
- Existing App: https://junior.sentry.dev/start-here/existing-app/
- Verify & Troubleshoot: https://junior.sentry.dev/start-here/verify-and-troubleshoot/

## Core Concepts

- Execution Model: https://junior.sentry.dev/concepts/execution-model/
- Thread Routing: https://junior.sentry.dev/concepts/thread-routing/
- Skills & Plugins: https://junior.sentry.dev/concepts/skills-and-plugins/
- Credentials & OAuth: https://junior.sentry.dev/concepts/credentials-and-oauth/

- Plugin Overview: https://junior.sentry.dev/extend/

- Linear: https://junior.sentry.dev/extend/linear-plugin/
- Notion: https://junior.sentry.dev/extend/notion-plugin/
